summary.archival_abstract: This original reporting published by Hologram News Network (HNN) on 2024-06-03 documents “Super Phoenix DAO Announces Mid-June CORE Data Cube NFT Mint.” Its surviving text addresses governance, economy, community, lore, technology. The record is preserved as contemporary evidence of how HNN presented the subject at publication time; factual and forward-looking claims remain attributed to the publication and require reconciliation with primary or later sources.
summary.historical_value: Preserves the HNN publication as contemporary community journalism and evidence of the network's editorial record.
summary.current_validity_warning: Claims reflect the publication date and may have been superseded, corrected, or disproven.

article_text:
Super Phoenix DAO Announces Mid-June CORE Data Cube NFT Mint
By KrigsPublished On: 3 June 2024Tags: superphoenix
ECOS SP Limited – The Super Phoenix DAO is gaining momentum as it heads towards its first public mint of the CORE Data Cube NFT. Owning a CORE Data Cube NFT will provide holders with a path to shared ownership of the largest ship in Galia, the Superphoenix Titan ship. Additionally, holders will receive a host of other airdrops, rewards, benefits, and exclusive access to the Superphoenix Titan ship itself. The CORE data Cube NFTs allow holders to participate in the creation of a powerful community within the Star Atlas ecosystem centered around the largest NFT asset sold in Web3.
There are six levels of Core Data Cubes, with the level of the NFT correlating to the rewards and airdrops that the holder will receive. These rewards can include Star Atlas ships, posters, and DAO tokens. The color of the NFT indicates the level of data Cube energy it contains. White and green colored NFTs are lower levels, while blue and red colored NFTs are higher levels. The highest level of Data Cube energy is contained within NFTs that are gold and and anomaly level. These CORE
Core Data Cube NFT
If you mint a core data Cube NFT and are later included in a snapshot, you will be whitelisted to the interior land habitation sale within the Superphoenix Titan ship. Additionally, you will have the opportunity to merge your data Cube NFTs to upgrade them to the next rarity tier. Merging NFTs will burn the original NFTs and mint new ones at the next tier.
The CORE data Cube NFTs allow holders to participate in the creation of a powerful community within the Star Atlas ecosystem. You can join the Super Phoenix DAO Discord server to learn more about the NFTs and to participate in a raffle for whitelist spots. A whitelist spot will allow you to mint your NFTs during a pre-mint window at a discounted price. The CORE data Cube NFTs allow holders to participate in the creation of a powerful community within the Star Atlas ecosystem.
About the Author: Krigs
An ardent supporter of emerging technologies, Krigs has been covering blockchain games for over two years and believes passionately in their power to revolutionize our collective gaming experience.
